narrative: As a Machine Learning Engineer with 4 years of experience at BYJU'S, this candidate ranks #18 primarily due to their strong technical alignment with our Search & Retrieval focus. Their profile showcases excellent JD-relevant skills, including LlamaIndex, Deep Learning, PyTorch, Elasticsearch, pgvector, and Haystack. Their product company background and Noida location are also strong fits for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. However, their experience level is slightly below our 5-9 YOE target, and minor profile credibility concerns were flagged.
